title: Recoloured Tooltips
description: Lets you configure the colour of item & GUI tooltips. Neoforge port of Coloured Tooltips.
body:
Neoforge 1.21.1 port of [Coloured Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/coloured-tooltips) by [Darkhax](https://modrinth.com/user/Darkhax).


This mod lets you configure the colour of all item and GUI tooltips in the game. You can do this through the config file found in your Minecraft folder, under 

_config/recolouredtooltips.json_

This config file has three entries: "borderStart" for the top border of the tooltip, "borderEnd" for the bottom border, and "background" for the background. Colours are automatically blended between the top and bottom border.

The colours are entered via an ARGB hex string, which is like a normal hex string, but prefaced with two extra characters to define transparency, amounting to eight characters in total.


To learn more about hex colours, or to help you on your way for your tooltips, check out my recommended online colour pickers [here](https://www.color-hex.com/) or [here](https://www.w3schools.com/colors/colors_picker.asp).



Please do not send bug reports or other complaints to Darkhax.


milady
